gotchas: **REPO RULE (absolute): never `git commit`/`push`/`merge`** — the user stages + commits. This overrides any global git guidance.
Backend env vars **only** via `lib.config.Config` (a PreToolUse hook blocks raw `os.environ` outside `lib/config/`).
**bare `python3` is 3.9** (fails on `X | Y` generic-alias unions at import) — always `uv run --no-sync python` from `backend/`.
The **Edit guard** needs the **Read tool** to have read a file (Bash `sed`/`rg` doesn't count) before editing.

The **duplicate-symbol guard** false-positives when you edit an _existing_ class/def whose name also exists elsewhere — `scrape-service/` has a parallel `lib/pipeline/types.py:PipelineMethod`, and `_ensure_indexes` is also a `scheduler` method. Workaround: keep the `class X:`/`def X` line OUT of the edit (anchor on the body).

pymongo **async `_OperationCancelled`** = event-loop-starvation symptom (background pool monitor / cleanup loop), NOT a Mongo outage. Root cause here was sync oxylabs calls blocking the loop (fixed via `to_thread`).

The fitment pipeline **nests**: top-level pipeline = one `runner` step (`PipelineStepRunner`) → nested `process_pipeline` with the real steps (taxonomy, fitment, …). Per-step caps apply at the nested level; the runner opts out (`step_timeout_sec=None`).
